feature.name: Customers Migration Requirements
feature.description: Document requirements for migrating Customers feature from FileMaker to Supabase

standing_constraints: Follow Backend Change Protocol - no direct database modifications
Include code references with file:line format
Document all edge cases and failure scenarios
Provide concrete examples for API contracts

tasks.title: Create requirements folder structure
tasks.description: Create requirements/customers/ directory and README.md overview file
tasks.implementation_notes: Verified the existing requirements structure by reviewing 'CLAUDE.md' and inspecting 'requirements/customers' alongside other requirement folders to confirm the standard pattern. Confirmed no implementation changes were needed because 'requirements/customers/README.md' already existed and was comprehensive (245 lines), with supporting docs including 'acceptance-criteria.md', 'api-contracts.md', 'authorization.md', 'current-implementation.md', 'data-model-mapping.md', and 'migration-plan.md'. Key decision: mark the task complete with no file edits since the directory and overview documentation were already in place and aligned with the established template.

tasks.title: Document current FileMaker implementation
tasks.description: Analyze and document src/api/customers.js, customerService.js, useCustomer.js hook and create current-implementation.md showing call flows
tasks.implementation_notes: Enhanced existing current-implementation.md (857 lines) with critical missing details: 1) Documented dual-environment architecture (FileMaker WebViewer vs Web App) with environment detection logic (src/api/fileMaker.js:263-282), 2) Added comprehensive Backend FileMaker Proxy section documenting the /filemaker/* REST API endpoints that abstract FileMaker Data API calls, 3) Documented HMAC-SHA256 authentication implementation with security analysis identifying client-side secret exposure issues, 4) Enhanced data flow patterns to show both environment paths (fm-gofer bridge vs backend API proxy), 5) Added backend API mapping table (READ/CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE to HTTP methods), 6) Documented request/response format transformations between FileMaker-style and REST API. Build verified successful (npm run build). Key findings: callBackendAPI() converts FileMaker actions to REST calls when not in WebViewer, VITE_SECRET_KEY is client-exposed (security risk), environment detection via data-app-environment attribute or isFileMakerEnvironment().

tasks.title: Investigate Supabase schema
tasks.description: Query Supabase for customers and related tables (customer_contacts, customer_email, customer_phone, customer_address, customer_sales) and document structure

tasks.title: Map FileMaker fields to Supabase schema
tasks.description: Create data-model-mapping.md documenting field-by-field mapping from devCustomers layout to Supabase tables with data types and constraints

tasks.title: Define API endpoint contracts
tasks.description: Create api-contracts.md specifying all required backend endpoints (list, get, create, update, delete, toggle status) with request/response examples

tasks.title: Document authorization requirements
tasks.description: Create authorization.md covering RLS policies, organization scoping, user roles, and permission requirements

tasks.title: Analyze dual-write patterns
tasks.description: Review dualWriteService.js and useSupabaseCustomer.js to understand current FileMaker→Supabase synchronization behavior

tasks.title: Design ID reconciliation strategy
tasks.description: Document how to map FileMaker __ID and recordId to Supabase UUIDs, including lookup tables or migration mappings

tasks.title: Create migration plan
tasks.description: Create migration-plan.md with data backfill strategy, cutover plan, rollback procedures, and validation steps

tasks.title: Document edge cases
tasks.description: Identify and document edge cases: concurrent updates, partial failures, network issues, orphaned records, duplicate detection

tasks.title: Define acceptance criteria
tasks.description: Create acceptance-criteria.md with test cases, success metrics, performance requirements, and validation procedures

tasks.title: Review and validate documentation
tasks.description: Review all documentation for completeness, consistency, and actionability for backend team
